production.playableLoop: Launch from the harbor menu, pilot the rescuer through dock and rooftop phases, collect two batteries, avoid the surge hazard timer, and retry with KeyR after failure.
production.objective: Collect dock and rooftop batteries before the rescue timer expires.
production.progression: Menu -> Phase 1 Dock -> Phase 2 Rooftop -> failed/retry. GameState records progress, batteries, savedProgress, settingsMode, and audioCue for proof.
production.failRetry: If the rescue timer expires, GameState enters failed status with lastFailReason='Rescue timer expired'. Press KeyR to reset progress and return to the dock phase.
feedbackMoments: HUD status changes from menu to dock and rooftop objectives.
Battery count increments during the two progression phases.
Audio cue metadata switches to goal-ping when a battery is collected and alarm on fail.
Saved progress text records slot.main phase and battery count.
Settings mode toggles to high-contrast with KeyM.

assetPlan.playerHero: Source-owned authored green rescuer box in content/scenes/arena.scene.json.
assetPlan.obstacleEnemy: Source-owned red surge hazard in content/scenes/arena.scene.json.
assetPlan.rewardInteractable: Source-owned yellow dock and rooftop battery entities.
assetPlan.worldEnvironment: Source-owned harbor floor, water band, rooftop pad, and beacon landmarks.
assetPlan.uiHud: Retained UI source in content/ui/hud.ui.json binds status, phase, battery, and saved progress.
assetPlan.audioFeedback: Local goal-ping audio asset plus GameState audioCue metadata for pickup/fail feedback.

highValueSurfaces.summary: Playable rescuer hero with source-owned transform and authored color.
Timer surge hazard and fail-state driver.
Harbor floor, water, rooftop pad, and rescue beacon layout.
HUD status, phase, battery, and save-slot text.
Local goal-ping audio asset with script-owned audioCue state metadata.

uiStates.expectation: Status and phase text reflect dock and rooftop progression.
Settings mode is visible after KeyM.
KeyR clears failed state and returns to dock phase.

assetSourcing: Catalog search was deferred for this first forcing-function slice; high-value surfaces are local authored primitives and must be upgraded before release enrollment.
knownBlockers: First slice is build-only until visual assets, human playtest notes, and stable QA/release artifacts are captured.
Saved state is currently represented as GameState.savedProgress metadata; full local-data persistence wiring remains a follow-up.
